original_hypothesis.title: AccountingManager.rescue Can Drain Pending Deposit Funds Breaking Solvency
original_hypothesis.hypothesis_description: The rescue function (onlyEmergency) can transfer any amount of any token including baseToken from the AccountingManager. If baseToken is rescued in an amount that reduces balanceOf below depositQueue.totalAWFDeposit, the fundamental solvency invariant is broken. Subsequent executeDeposit calls would still forward tokens to connectors, but there wouldn't be enough base tokens to cover all pending deposits, causing later depositors' funds to be consumed by earlier depositors' connector routing.
original_hypothesis.investigation_rationale: rescue has no check against depositQueue.totalAWFDeposit or any other invariant. It can drain the entire baseToken balance. This breaks INV-ECON-002: baseToken.balanceOf >= depositQueue.totalAWFDeposit.

proof_of_signal.pattern: rescue transfers arbitrary amount with no check against depositQueue.totalAWFDeposit; IERC20(token).safeTransfer(msg.sender, amount) has no bounds validation

preconditions: Emergency caller rescues baseToken in amount > available (balance - totalAWFDeposit)

initial_economic_evidence.suspicious_calculation: No bounds check: rescue(baseToken, balanceOf(this)) drains everything including pending deposits
initial_economic_evidence.manipulation_vector: Compromised emergency key can steal pending deposits
initial_economic_evidence.profit_hypothesis: Direct theft of all pending deposit funds plus any idle base tokens

economic_questions: What is the typical totalAWFDeposit amount at any given time?
How is the emergency role protected?
Should rescue be bounded by available (non-pending) balance?
validation_requirements: Call rescue(baseToken, fullBalance) and verify totalAWFDeposit invariant violation
Attempt executeDeposit after rescue and verify failure mode
Check if TVL() returns correct value after rescue

potential_victim_impact.direct_victims: All depositors with pending deposits in queue

investigation_priorities.calculation_validation: Verify no bounds check on rescue amount

validation_result.impact_summary: Filtered before validation: attack_realism is LOW
validation_result.detailed_analysis: This hypothesis was auto-rejected because its attack_realism grade is LOW. Preconditions require actions outside the attacker's control (off-chain compromise, victim cooperation, or admin collusion). No LLM validation was performed.
